query: mixed white balance interior window photograph orange blue contrast
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — mixed white balance interior, dual color temperatures clash

response.objective_caption: A nighttime winter scene of a snow-covered residential yard in front of a dark building. In the foreground, a metal laundry rack and nearby shrubs are heavily coated with snow. Two illuminated ground-floor windows are visible: one emits a vivid blue light with dark silhouettes of hanging garments behind the glass, while the other glows with warm interior light. Deep, uneven snowdrifts blanket the ground and partially bury objects along the building's foundation.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime winter scene suffused with an oppressive, isolating atmosphere, showing a snow-covered residential yard in front of a dark building. Heavy snow weighs down a metal laundry rack and shrubs in the foreground, while deep drifts smother the uneven ground. An intense blue light floods one window, silhouetting hanging garments and starkly contrasting with the warm glow of a second window, deepening the sense of cold dread and melancholic unease across the frozen landscape.
